ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Two-letter abbreviation of the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the state in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Primary timezone of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state in which the zone is located */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone (e.g., EAST, WEST) */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the zone in square kilometers */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the zone */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_zones_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each projection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the projection method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the projection method */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of projection method (e.g., cylindrical, conic, azimuthal) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the projection method */,
  "usage_frequency" INTEGER /* Usage frequency of the projection method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datums" (
  "datum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each datum */,
  "datum_name" TEXT /* Name of the datum (e.g., NAD83) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the datum */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of datum (e.g., horizontal, vertical) */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the datum */,
  "usage_frequency" INTEGER /* Usage frequency of the datum */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("datum_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usgs_codes" (
  "usgs_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each USGS code */,
  "code" INTEGER /* USGS code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the USGS code */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of USGS code (e.g., state, regional) */,
  "usage_frequency" INTEGER /* Usage frequency of the USGS code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usgs_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "epsg_codes" (
  "epsg_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each EPSG code */,
  "code" INTEGER /* EPSG code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the EPSG code */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of EPSG code (e.g., state, regional) */,
  "usage_frequency" INTEGER /* Usage frequency of the EPSG code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("epsg_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_zone_references" (
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reference */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone within the state */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the projection method used */,
  "datum_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the datum used */,
  "usgs_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the USGS code */,
  "epsg_code_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the EPSG code */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date of last update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reference (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_zone_references_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_zone_references_datum_id FOREIGN KEY ("datum_id") REFERENCES datums ("datum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_zone_references_usgs_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("usgs_code_id") REFERENCES usgs_codes ("usgs_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_zone_references_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES projection_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_zone_references_epsg_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("epsg_code_id") REFERENCES epsg_codes ("epsg_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_zone_references_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., geospatial analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reference being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the reference */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the reference was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_reference_id FOREIGN KEY ("reference_id") REFERENCES state_zone_references ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reference system */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the reference system */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the changes were made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_reference_id FOREIGN KEY ("reference_id") REFERENCES state_zone_references ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reporting" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reference system */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., usage, changes) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reporting_reference_id FOREIGN KEY ("reference_id") REFERENCES state_zone_references ("reference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "reference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reference system */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_reference_id FOREIGN KEY ("reference_id") REFERENCES state_zone_references ("reference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
